subject: Re: Gatan DM gain ref
body:
Hi Wim,

this is expected behavior for the new version if the combination of TIFF + 
DM gain ref didn't require flipping previously. I honestly don't know why 
anyone thought it would be a good idea to not read the data in the order it 
physically exists, but rather adhere to some axis conventions only relevant 
for display – but that's the way it is now. Please note that RELION won't 
accept a DM gain ref or do any flipping itself, so converting to MRC and 
flipping will be necessary if you want to polish particles.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Wednesday, November 21, 2018 at 11:35:25 AM UTC+1, wimhag@gmail.com 
wrote:
>
>
> Using TIF, the DM gain ref needs "Flip Y axis" in 1.06.
> Wim
>
